title: Preserve Morphology Contracts And Overlay Ownership
scope: morphology stage contracts, morphology stage implementations, map-hydrology migrated consumers, maps, and narrative hotspot producer ownership
forbids: runtime continent ids, LandmassRegionId contracts, morphology dual reads, overlay leakage, legacy morphology imports/config keys, or legacy plate-driver dependencies
why: Morphology contract surfaces are structural boundaries between physics stages, map projection, and narrative-owned overlays.
message: Route morphology data through canonical artifacts and keep overlay/effect ownership at its owning stage.
